data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet on a solid flat #FF00FF magenta chroma-key background only. Sheet layout: exactly 2 rows by 2 columns, exactly 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. No visible grid lines, borders, labels, text, numbers, UI, watermark, floor, shadow, gradients, or texture.

Subject: cute Q-version ranged enemy for Samsara Ascension, a chibi corrupted xianxia spell archer. Big head, small body, dark teal robe, tiny bow or talisman focus kept close, sly hostile expression, rounded readable silhouette, clean HD hand-painted chibi fantasy RPG sprite, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

View/framing: full body visible, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, stable bottom/feet anchor line when grounded, same body height and same pixel scale in every frame. Subject fills about 58 to 66 percent of each cell with generous magenta margin. Entire subject and any weapon, horn, petal, hair, sleeve, tail, talisman, or tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell; nothing crosses a cell edge.

Animation: idle. Show real body pose changes across the four frames, not only scaling, camera movement, glow changes, or sliding.
1) top-left: neutral ready posture, body settled.
2) top-right: visible breathing or energy inhale, shoulders or core lifts, small attached aura brightens.
3) bottom-left: weight shifts to the opposite side, cloth, hair, petals, arms, or weapon sway clearly.
4) bottom-right: settle back toward the first pose, aura dims, loop returns naturally.

Consistency: preserve the exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/eyes/core face, costume/armor marks, weapon or focus, and material language in every cell; only pose, compact clothing motion, limbs, hair, petals, weapon angle, and small attached aura may change.

Style: clean HD hand-painted fantasy RPG sprite sheet, crisp readable shapes, cute but sinister, dark teal robe, corrupted xianxia spell archer vibe, visually coherent animation frame set.
